title: Project: ETERNUM Pack
description: This is the official Modpack for the ETERNUM Server! It adds crucial features, such as Voice Chat, while also enhancing the overall gameplay experience.
body:
This is the official Modpack for the Project: ETERNUM server! It includes some crucial mods, like Voice Chat, aswell as performance boosts, shaders and other QoL upgrades. 

Every mod included:
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Colourful containers GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui)
- [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)
- [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ImmediatlyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Miniature Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/miniature-shader)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [Smooth Scrolling](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Solas Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)
- [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/lightweight-inventory-sorting)
- [Quick Tree Decay](https://modrinth.com/mod/accelerated-decay)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [Jade Reputation](https://modrinth.com/mod/your-reputation-jade)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen)
- [Sparkles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sparkles)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [Video Tape](https://modrinth.com/mod/videotape)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)
- [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium)
- [Formations Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations-nether)
